name: lakelevelnow
description: LakeLevelNow — live US lake & reservoir water levels. Static, SEO-first, live-data-first. Portfolio Empire.

comments.security: No axios dependency by design (supply-chain hardening — see project memory: axios 1.14.1/0.30.4 compromised 2026-03-31; never pin via ^/~). All HTTP uses Node 18+ native fetch.
comments.deploy: Static output in dist/ deployed to Cloudflare Workers (static assets). Pipeline: npm run fetch (USGS+CDEC -> src/data) -> npm run build -> wrangler deploy -> npm run indexnow.
